offers.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl Pre-order DLC
offers.description: Pre-order bonuses: Vintar weapon “Veteran”, Sunrise suit “Tourist”, Unique “Stalker” Backpack. Additional campfire content: Guitar tunes & additional stories

offers.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl OST&Artbook
offers.description: Desolation, solitude, and mind-bending wonders. The Zone is what you consider it to be, but its beauty and unique atmosphere are something that can be felt even outside of it.

offers.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl — Season Pass
offers.description: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl is the unforgiving FPS survival adventure in a dark science-fiction open world. Scavenge for gear and resources, hunt for wonders, make hard decisions to survive and pave the path through the Chornobyl Anomalous Zone.

offers.title: Platinum Founder Pack
offers.description:
10,000 Credits, Platinum Founder In-Game Title,
Iron/Bronze/Silver/Gold In-Game Title, Platinum Founder Portrait Frame, Iron/Bronze/Silver/Gold Portrait Frame, Digital Soundtrack, Platinum Founder Weapon Effect, Founder Weapon Effect, Platinum Founder Portal Effect and more...
